lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Macklin! Did you figure out what was going on? We don’t have much time!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Yeah, I got it all fixed Cap, but it still seems like we’re all doomed...

lines.speaker: Captain Dwyer
lines.text: Get back to the Main Control Center! You probably need to reboot the entire system!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Seriously? There’s another thing I have to do?
